title: Evangelion PianoForte
wikitext:
{{Media Infobox
| name      = Evangelion PianoForte #1
| image     = [[Image:Evangelion PianoForte.jpg|200px]]
| publisher = {{Publisher|JP=King Records/Starchild}}
| release   = {{Release|JP=October 23, 2013}}
| media     = Audio CD
| author    = [[Shiro Sagisu]]
}}
'''Evangelion PianoForte #1''' is an album consisting of songs arranged for the piano which come from the [[Neon Genesis Evangelion]] TV series, the movie [[The End of Evangelion]], and pieces from some of the [[Rebuild]] movies (3.0 had come out the year before). It also contains the unused song [[Everything You've Ever Dreamed]]. It was released by Starchild on October 23, 2013.

html:
Evangelion PianoForte #1
Publisher
  • Japan King Records/Starchild
Release Date
  • Japan October 23, 2013
Media Type Audio CD
Author Shiro Sagisu

Evangelion PianoForte #1 is an album consisting of songs arranged for the piano which come from the Neon Genesis Evangelion TV series, the movie The End of Evangelion, and pieces from some of the Rebuild movies (3.0 had come out the year before). It also contains the unused song Everything You've Ever Dreamed. It was released by Starchild on October 23, 2013.

Track Listing[edit]

All music composed by Shiro Sagisu.

Article: Evangelion PianoForte
Evangelion PianoForte #1 is an album consisting of songs arranged for the piano which come from the Neon Genesis Evangelion TV series, the movie The End of Evangelion, and pieces from some of the Rebuild movies (3.0 had come out the year before). It also contains the unused song Everything You've Ever Dreamed. It was released by Starchild on October 23, 2013.
